title: Solar Apocalypse: Reforged
description: A port of Solar Apocalypse Refabricated to forge
body:
# Solar Apocalypse: Reforged
A forge port of the Solar Apocalypse mod for 1.18.2 and beyond. Originally intended for me and a few friends to play on as there is no forge version for 1.18.2.

THIS IS MOSTLY A 1:1 TRANSLATION PORT OF THE ORIGINAL MOD I DON'T OWN THE CODE I MERELY JUST PORTED IT TO MOJMAPS AND JAVA INSTEAD OF KOTLIN

## Original Summary
This mod starts a Solar Apocalypse. Water is no longer infinite. For the first two days nothing happens. From the third day and beyond grass and mycelium start turning to dirt when exposed to the daylight. From the fifth day and beyond flammable blocks get set on fire in daylight, meltable blocks melt in daylight, water evaporates in daylight, and most blocks that are made of organic matter get destroyed in daylight. From the seventh day and beyond mobs and players will burn when exposed to daylight. You can also pick if Coarse Dirt turns to Sand and what phase that happens.
# ORIGINAL PROJECT
https://modrinth.com/mod/solar-apocalypse
IF YOU LIKE WHAT YOU SEE DONATE TO THE CREATOR OF SOLAR APOCALYPSE REFABRICATED, I DO THIS STUFF FOR FREE!
